fields.description: When enabled, delivery confirmation will automatically create a billing record
fields.label: Auto-create billing on delivery confirmation

fields.description: Google Chat space ID for delivery 1-stop-away alerts (e.g. spaces/AAQABiNmpBg). Leave blank to use default.
fields.label: Delivery Notification Space

fields.description: Customer service phone number shown in store-facing communications
fields.label: Customer Service Phone

fields.description: Minimum remaining shelf life (in days) for batches to pass the dispatch/receiving gate. Set 0 to disable.
fields.label: Minimum Shelf Life (Days)

fields.description: PO grand total above this amount requires dual approval (CPO + CFO)
fields.label: Dual Approval Threshold

fields.description: Annual purchases above this amount require supplier TIN on file
fields.label: TIN Requirement Threshold

fields.description: Days since supplier creation to consider them a 'new supplier' for CEO approval
fields.label: New Supplier Window (Days)

fields.description: Block PO if item price exceeds this percentage variance from historical average
fields.label: Price Variance Block %

fields.description: Number of days to look back for price variance calculation
fields.label: Price Variance Lookback (Days)

fields.description: Default VAT rate for VAT-registered suppliers (%). Non-VAT and exempt suppliers use 0%.
fields.label: Default VAT Rate

fields.description: Default EWT rate (%) used when supplier has no specific rate.
fields.label: Default EWT Rate

fields.description: FG items with stock below this are flagged as low stock
fields.label: FG Low Stock Threshold

fields.description: Default safety stock for non-FG items when item-level safety_stock is not set
fields.label: Non-FG Low Stock Fallback

fields.description: Days to subtract from shelf life for dispatch buffer
fields.label: Shelf Life Dispatch Buffer (Days)

fields.description: GR/IR Clearing account for goods receipt accrual
fields.label: GR/IR Clearing Account

fields.description: Input VAT account for goods purchases
fields.label: Input VAT - Goods

fields.description: Input VAT account for services purchases
fields.label: Input VAT - Services

fields.description: Input VAT account for capital goods purchases
fields.label: Input VAT - Capital Goods

fields.description: Advances to Suppliers account for advance payment tracking
fields.label: Advances to Suppliers Account

fields.description: EWT Payable account for withholding tax entries
fields.label: EWT Payable Account

fields.description: Accounts Payable - Trade account
fields.label: AP Trade Account

fields.description: Default cost center for procurement GL entries
fields.label: Default Cost Center

fields.description: CPO (Chief Procurement Officer) who approves POs as first-level approver
fields.label: CPO Approver

fields.description: CFO who approves POs above dual approval threshold
fields.label: CFO Approver

fields.description: CEO who approves POs from new suppliers
fields.label: CEO Approver
